message:
feat(extras): expand theme system and add visual_fx primitives

Significantly enhances the ftui-extras theme module and introduces
visual_fx primitives for deterministic visual effects.

Theme expansion (95 new lines):
- Extended color palette and semantic color tokens
- Improved theme switching infrastructure
- Better alpha/transparency handling
- Enhanced gradient support

New visual_fx module:
- FxQuality enum (Low/Medium/High) for graceful degradation
- Resolved theme inputs as data-only types
- Backdrop effect primitives
- Zero-allocation design for per-frame safety
- Tiny-area safe (handles zero width/height)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -45,6 +45,11 @@ timer = []
 diagram = ["dep:unicode-width"]
 theme = ["dep:ftui-render", "dep:ftui-style"]
 text-effects = ["dep:ftui-core", "dep:ftui-render", "dep:ftui-style", "dep:ftui-widgets"]
+visual-fx = ["dep:ftui-render", "dep:ftui-style", "dep:ftui-widgets"]
+visual-fx-metaballs = ["visual-fx"]
+visual-fx-plasma = ["visual-fx"]
+# GPU acceleration is strictly opt-in. No GPU deps are pulled unless this feature is enabled.
+fx-gpu = ["visual-fx-metaballs"]
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 tracing = "0.1"
